title: Add Slack rich messages (Block Kit media cards)
description: Port SlackService message queue and Block Kit media cards from v1. Tools like addMovie/addSeries should display poster + overview cards after adding. Implement message_queue pattern where tools can queue blocks during execution.

title: Add TMDB API client
description: Create src/tmdb/api.ts with TMDB API client. Endpoints: search/movie, search/tv, search/multi, movie/{id}, tv/{id}. Uses TMDB_API_TOKEN env var as Bearer token.

title: Expand Sonarr API client for new tools
description: v2 Sonarr API only has getAllSeries. Add endpoints needed by new tools: series/{id}, series/lookup, episode, queue, calendar, command, history. Port from v1 src/lib/sonarr/api.ts.

title: Add Radarr webhook endpoint
description: Add POST /webhooks/radarr route. Accept RadarrWebhookPayload, ignore Upgrade/Test events. On Download: find requesters via media_refs, generate AI notification, post to original Slack thread.

title: Add qBittorrent API client and tools
description: Create src/qbittorrent/api.ts and tools.ts. API client with cookie-based auth (login, re-auth on 403). Tools: getTorrents (with filter param) and deleteTorrents (by hash array). Uses QBITTORRENT_HOST/USERNAME/PASSWORD env vars.

title: Add media_refs table for cross-thread tracking
description: Add media_refs table to Postgres schema: id, conversation_id (FK), tool_call_id, media_type (movie|series), ids (jsonb with tmdb/radarr/tvdb/sonarr keys), title, action (search|add|remove|query), created_at. Add index on conversation_id. Generate and apply migration.

title: Add Radarr tools: getQueue, getHistory
description: Port getQueue (downloading/queued movies) and getHistory (grabbed/downloaded/deleted history) tools from v1.

title: Add token optimization (toPartial* helpers)
description: Port toPartialMovie, toPartialSeries, toPartialTorrent, etc. from v1. These strip API responses to minimal fields to reduce token usage in tool results.

title: Save media refs from add/remove tools
description: When addMovie/addSeries/removeMovie/removeSeries tools execute, save a media_ref record with the relevant IDs and action. Port the extractor/repository logic from v1.

title: Add Radarr API client
description: Port the Radarr API layer from v1: sonarrFetch-style generic client, endpoints for movie lookup, search, add, remove, queue, history. File: src/radarr/api.ts

title: Add Sonarr tools: getEpisodes, getQueue, getCalendar, searchEpisodes, getHistory
description: Port remaining Sonarr tools: getEpisodes (by series), getQueue (downloading), getCalendar (upcoming), searchEpisodes (trigger search), getHistory (download history).

title: Add Slack markdown conversion
description: Port mrkdwnFormat from v1 that converts standard markdown bold (**text**) to Slack mrkdwn bold (*text*) in responses.

title: Add Slack @mention filtering for channels
description: In v1, channel messages are only processed if they @mention the bot (U099N4BJT5Y). v2 processes all messages. Add filtering so non-DM messages require an @mention.

title: Add Ultra API client and ultraStats tool
description: Create src/ultra/api.ts and tools.ts. Single tool: ultraStats returns freeStorage/totalStorage/usedStorage from Ultra seedbox API. Uses ULTRA_API_TOKEN and ULTRA_HOST env vars.

title: Add AI-powered webhook notification generator
description: Port notification message generation from v1. Use Claude Haiku to generate casual notification messages when media imports. Include episode numbers for TV. Fallback to template on AI failure.

title: Add reason field to all agent tool calls
description: Add a 'reason' parameter to every tool's TypeBox parameters so the LLM explains why it's making each tool call. Use a shared reasonParam partial spread into every tool's parameters. Log the reason in structured logs for observability and debugging. 23 tools to update across sonarr/tools.ts, radarr/tools.ts, and tmdb/tools.ts.

title: Add Sonarr webhook endpoint
description: Add POST /webhooks/sonarr route. Accept SonarrWebhookPayload, ignore Upgrade/Test events. On Download: find requesters via media_refs, generate AI notification with episode info, post to original Slack thread.

title: Add Radarr tools: searchMovies
description: Port searchMovies tool from v1. Searches Radarr for movies by title.

title: Add Slack status indicators
description: Port assistant.threads.setStatus from v1. Set 'is thinking...' on message receipt, update status per tool call (e.g. 'is searching for X in Radarr...'), clear on completion. Uses Slack assistant API.

title: Add Sonarr tools: getSeriesBySonarrId, searchSeries
description: Port getSeriesBySonarrId (single series by ID) and searchSeries (search by title) tools from v1.

title: Add presentListOfMovies Slack tool
description: Port the presentListOfMovies tool from v1. Takes array of {tmdbId, title, year}, fetches poster from Radarr, sends Block Kit media sections to Slack thread.

title: Add Slack username resolution
description: Port username resolution from v1. Call users.info for unique user IDs in thread, build usernameMap, replace <@USERID> with @displayname in message text. Inject current user's name into system prompt.

title: Add Radarr tools: addMovie, removeMovie
description: Port addMovie (by TMDB ID, with searchForMovie:true) and removeMovie (delete files from disk) tools from v1.

title: Port v1 system prompt to v2
description: Replace the minimal v2 system prompt with the detailed v1 version. Include: personality (friendly, concise, no emojis, no follow-ups), media disambiguation logic, Keegan easter egg, architecture knowledge, tool usage rules, dynamic user/date injection.

title: Add Sonarr tools: addSeries, removeSeries, removeSeason
description: Port addSeries (by TVDB ID with monitor option), removeSeries (delete files), and removeSeason (delete season files + unmonitor) from v1.

title: Add Radarr tools: getMovie, getMovies
description: Port getMovie (by ID) and getMovies (all) tools from v1. Read-only library inspection.

title: Add TMDB tools
description: Port 5 TMDB tools: searchMoviesOnTMDB, searchSeriesOnTMDB, searchTMDB (multi), getMovieDetailsFromTMDB, getSeriesDetailsFromTMDB.
